stemHtml:
Refer to figures or to Stuttgart charts 10-3P and 10-3C from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. 
The pilot is advised by ATC to expect either DKB 9B RNAV SID (OVERLAY) or DKB 9B SID. Which of the following is correct?

options.a: Chart 10-3C: It uses GPS, but the pilot has to monitor the VOR/DME data.
options.b: Chart 10-3C: GPS is not used, and the pilot is not required to monitor the VOR/DME data.
options.c: Chart 10-3P: It utilizes GPS by inserting the waypoints into the FMS, and the pilot is not required to utilize the raw VOR/DME data.
options.d: Chart 10-3P: It utilizes GPS by inserting the waypoints into the FMS, and requires the pilot to monitor the VOR/DME data.
